name: Curried Yogurt Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the yogurt, curry powder, lemon juice, black pepper, honey, and hot pepper sauce.
2. Stir well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. If possible, allow the dip to set at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
4. Garnish with finely chopped almonds or walnuts, if desired.
5. Makes 1 cup.
6. Serve with fresh vegetables or pita crisps.
